## Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Problem Statement

What use case does this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the API or behavior you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives you evaluated.

## Additional Context

Add references, examples, or screenshots if useful.
